challenge.description: U ovom videu ćete naučiti kako da radite sa aktuatorima unutar klasa objekata.

questions.text: Koja od sledećih je ispravan način za kreiranje funkcije unutar klase?

answers.answer:
class Student:
    def __init__(self, name, age):
        self.name = name
        self.age = age

    def greet(self.function):
        return f"Hello, my name is {self.name} and I am {self.age} years old."

class Student:
    def __init__(self, name, age):
        self.name = name
        self.age = age

    def greet(self):
        return f"Hello, my name is {self.name} and I am {self.age} years old."

class Student:
    def __init__(self, name, age):
        self.name = name
        self.age = age

    def greet(self):
        self.pass

class Student:
    def __init__(self, name, age):
        self.name = name
        self.age = age

    greet = (self):
        return f"Hello, my name is {self.name} and I am {self.age} years old."

challenge.title: Alati za stvari / Funkcionalnosti
